title: Sketch patch evaluation artifact contract
goal: Define a non-runtime patch-evaluation.v1 contract with mandatory non-claims and provenance fields before any Patch Evaluation Sidecar implementation.

acceptance.assertion: The artifact contract is documented or explicitly deferred without adding runtime patch execution.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The contract requires non-claims for correctness, test sufficiency, security, runtime behavior and merge authorization.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Lenskit PR #893 added the Patch Evaluation Artifact v1 contract.

checks: python -m pytest merger/lenskit/tests/test_patch_evaluation.py -> 15 passed after review hardening
GitHub PR #893 CI passed before squash merge
acceptance_summary: Contract root is strict and pins authority to external_evaluation_evidence.

Mandatory non-claims include correctness, test sufficiency, security correctness, runtime behavior outside evaluated commands, merge authorization, merge readiness, regression absence, repo understanding, and claim truth.
